Demo Mode — monetary values hidden Turn off

Track anesthesia cases, shifts, and production points.

Important: Do not store any patient-identifiable information (names, MRNs, account numbers, DOBs) in this app. Only record procedure types, times, and point data.

Signing in...

📣

Compensation Updates

1. ICU/ER Lines (SF 1 & SF 2)
New case type for call-ins solely to intubate, place central lines, or arterial lines. Awards 30 bonus points on top of normal AR and production.

2. Pain Rounding Update
Effective April 1, 2026: each Pain Rounding entry now adds 10 minutes of AR points at your shift rate if you are not clocked in. If clocked in, points accrue as normal.

3. General OR - Float
New shift type for float assignments. Same as OR/General but adds a 30-point float bonus to your shift total.

💉

Welcome to MWA Point Tracker

Track your anesthesia cases and production points — set up in 60 seconds.

📅

Log Your Shift

1. Tap the Work tab below
2. Pick your assignment type (OR, OB, etc.)
3. Enter your start & end times
4. Tap Save Shift
🗓

Adding a Whole Month

How do you want to fill in the rest of your shifts?

✏
Enter Manually Tap each day on the Daily tab and pick the assignment
📅
Sync from QGenda Have QGenda push to Google Calendar, then connect this app
Recommended
📤

Step 1 of 2 — QGenda → Google Calendar

First, get QGenda to push your assignments into a Google Calendar.

1. Open the QGenda app or website
2. Open Settings → Calendar Sync (label varies)
3. Sign in with your Google account and pick a calendar
4. Wait a moment for QGenda to push the next month

When the events show up in Google Calendar, hit Next.

🔗

Step 2 of 2 — This App → Google Calendar

Now connect this app to that same calendar.

1. Tap More → Settings
2. In the Calendar Sync card, sign in with the same Google account
3. Pick the calendar QGenda is pushing to
4. Tap Sync Calendar — shifts auto-fill from the events
📋

Log Your Cases

1. After saving a shift, the case form appears
2. Select the procedure type
3. Enter units and times
4. Tap Save Case — repeat for each case
📊

Catch Up on Past Data

How would you like to add your history?

✨
Start Fresh Begin tracking from today
📥
Import from File Upload a JSON or spreadsheet
📝
Enter Total Points Enter monthly point totals manually
Easiest
🪙

Revenue Projections

1. Go to the Comp tab
2. Enter your estimated $/point value
3. This unlocks revenue projections on the Data tab

Shift Setup

to

Subspecialty Options

Cardiac/Liver call automatically earns its 45-pt subspecialty bonus plus pager pay (14 hrs weekday, 24 hrs weekend/holiday) — 94 pts weekday base, 129 pts weekend/holiday base.

Total pager pay hours for this shift (typically 14 on weekdays, 24 on weekends/holidays). Pays 3.5 pts per hour. Add clocked-in time entries above for any AR earned during this shift.

Track the morning OR clock-ins separately from this shift. Earns 20 pts/hr at minimum 80 pts on a weekday non-holiday. Forced off in the morning (no times entered) pays 56.

Setup instructions

Historical Trends

Points History

▼
How to use this table

Billing runs one month behind. Each row's $/pt value should come from the prior month's office billing report.

For example, in March you'll have February's billing report available — update the Feb row with that $/pt value.

Monthly Point Override

How to fill this in

Enter values from the reports for the month shown in the label.

  • Time Points — Actual Qgenda time points for that month, if they differ from the calculated total.
  • Prod Points — Production/billing points from the office total for that month.
  • Compensation — Compensation total from that month's compensation summary report.

Annual Tax Breakdown

Settings

Your group's location. Contact the admin to change.

Point Value ($/pt)

Set on the Compensation page (Paycheck Projection card). Saved per month and used for every monetary estimate across the app.

December Bonus Paycheck

December includes a 2nd bonus paycheck estimated from the year's average. Enter bonus stipends and non-guaranteed payments in the December Paycheck Projection breakdown.

Scan Settings

Required for billing sheet scanning. Free tier: 1,000 scans/month. Each user needs their own key.

How to get an API key
  1. Go to Google Cloud Console
  2. Create a project (or select an existing one)
  3. Go to APIs & Services → Library
  4. Search for Cloud Vision API and click Enable
  5. Go to APIs & Services → Credentials
  6. Click Create Credentials → API Key
  7. Copy the key and paste it above
  8. Recommended: Click Edit API Key to restrict it:
    • Application restrictions → HTTP referrers → add rileycrandall04.github.io/*
    • API restrictions → Restrict key → select Cloud Vision API only

Account

Synced

Shared Data

Shares de-identified case data (procedure, times, ASA code) with your group for surgeon efficiency and procedure time lookups. No personal notes are shared.

Display

Hides all dollar amounts, compensation, and paycheck data throughout the app. Useful when showing the app to others. Your data is not erased.

Data Management

Monthly History

January 2026

Days Worked
0

No shifts recorded for this month.

Import Shifts from QGenda

Upload a QGenda time punch export (.xlsx, .csv, or screenshot) to import shifts into the tracker. Dates with existing shifts will be skipped.

Required CSV/Excel format
Required columns (exact header names):
Schedule Date, Effective Clock In Date, Effective Clock In Time, Effective Clock Out Date, Effective Clock Out Time, Duration, Scheduled Task Abbreviation

Optional columns: Location Name, Notes

Example row:
1/5/2026 | 7:40 | 1/5/2026 | 17:03 | 9.38 | UVH 15

Times should be in 24-hour format (7:00, 17:03) or Excel time values. Dates should be M/D/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD. Multiple entries per date are grouped into one shift with multiple time entries.
📅

Tap to upload QGenda .xlsx, .csv, or screenshot

Import Cases

Upload cases from Excel (.xlsx), CSV (Google Sheet export), PDF (Charge Detail), or screenshot. Duplicate cases (same date + start time) will be skipped.

Recommended Excel column format
Excel (.xlsx) — use a header row with these column names:
Date | Procedure | ASA Code | Base Units | Start | End | Surgeon | Modifier | Shared

Column details:
Date: M/D, M/D/YYYY, or Excel date (required)
Procedure: e.g., Lap Chole, Total Knee
ASA Code: e.g., 00740, 01402
Base Units: ASA base unit value (numeric)
Start / End: H:MM AM/PM or 24-hour HH:MM
Surgeon: Attending name
Modifier: "E" for emergency, "4" or "5" for ASA physical status
Shared: "Y" if shared/split case

Headers are matched flexibly (e.g., "proc", "description", "case" all match Procedure). Only Date is required — all other columns are optional. Shifts are auto-created for dates without an existing shift. Duplicates (same date + start time) are skipped.

CSV fallback (no header row):
Date, Surgeon, Base Units, Start, End, Time, Modifiers, Block, Shared?, Points
1/5,A Hill,6,8:02:00 AM,11:08:00 AM,186.00,,,,21.6
📋

Tap to upload .xlsx, .csv, .pdf, or screenshot

Scan Billing Sheet

▼

Scan a paper billing sheet using your camera or a photo. This opens the Work page scanner.

Flagged Cases & Shifts

Items flagged for missing time punches or follow-up. Tap the flag icon to unflag.

Recent Updates

What's new in the Point Tracker.

Mar 31, 2026

  • Paycheck Projection overhaul — The Paycheck Projection card is now the single hub for all monthly financial data. Navigate months with arrow buttons to view past and future paycheck estimates. Stipends, deductions, retirement, actual revenue, and deposit amounts are all entered directly in the breakdown panel.
  • Stipend carryover — Stipend and deduction entries automatically carry over from the most recent prior month when navigating to a new month. Retirement contributions also carry over and can be cleared by entering $0.
  • Non-guaranteed payments — Three fixed non-guaranteed payment rows (Class B Margin, CRNA Distribution, Surgical Center Dist) are always visible. The Calculated Bank Deposit shows a guaranteed vs non-guaranteed breakdown when applicable.
  • Annual Tax Breakdown — New collapsible card at the bottom of the compensation tab showing calendar-year totals for total revenue, guaranteed income, non-guaranteed income, retirement contributions, and deductions. Navigate between years with arrow buttons. Only includes months where the paycheck has been received (on the 20th, adjusted for weekends).
  • Per-month $/pt persistence — The $/point value now saves per-month. When navigating to a month without a saved value, the prior month’s value is carried over and shown in italics to indicate it hasn’t been confirmed yet.
  • Actual revenue entry — Enter the Pooled Compensation amount from the compensation summary report directly in the Paycheck Projection breakdown. When entered, the estimated paycheck uses the actual revenue instead of the calculated blended value. Points History table is now read-only; clicking “edit” navigates to the Projection card.
  • Paycheck reminder improvements — Monthly reminders now link directly to the Paycheck Projection card and open the breakdown for the relevant month. Added a “Skip” option that persists per-month so reminders don’t return after reload.
  • Case edit autocomplete — Editing an existing case now shows predictive text for the procedure name, just like the case entry form. Selecting a suggestion auto-fills the ASA code and base units.
  • Procedure Time Lookup — Search by surgeon name to see all procedures performed by that surgeon with average times and standard deviations. Surgeon search shows a surgeon-first layout with procedures listed underneath.
  • Card renames — “Historical Compensation” renamed to “Points History”, “Paycheck Tracking” to “Paycheck History”, “Earnings Estimator” to “Annual Earning Pace”, and “Estimated Paycheck” to “Calculated Bank Deposit”. Labels use “Revenue” instead of “Production” throughout the Projection card.
  • Override page fix — Monthly override page now defaults to the prior month and shows payday context (e.g., “Enter March 2026 values, received on April 2026 payday”).
  • Deduction support — Stipend amount inputs now use a full keyboard on mobile to allow entering negative values for deductions. All values formatted as dollars and cents.

Mar 9, 2026

  • Earnings Estimator redesign — Replaced the old avg-pts/hr × hrs/week model with a per-shift-type projection. The estimator now shows a table of each shift type you’ve worked, with auto-calculated avg points per shift and shifts per week. Edit any value to explore what-if scenarios; overrides are highlighted and resettable. Annual estimate uses total weekly points × 52 × $/pt, with vacation naturally baked in.
  • Daily avg pts/shift fix — Points per shift on the daily screen now ignores future scheduled dates in the current month, giving an accurate running average through today.
  • Time input editing — Military time inputs now allow smooth backspacing and deleting through the colon. Editing feels natural—type or delete as if the colon isn’t there and it reformats automatically.
  • ASA reference redesign — The ASA code reference page now uses concise single-line rows with expandable details. Codes are organized by section with a search bar and collapsible categories.
  • Admin ASA editor — Admins can add, edit, and remove ASA codes with editable base unit values. Supports adding multiple codes at once, per-section organization, and an “Other” section for shared codes.
  • Procedure ↔ ASA mapping — User-specific procedure-to-ASA-code mappings are now maintained. Procedure suggestions skip when the procedure name is already filled in.

Mar 6, 2026

  • Points ↔ dollars toggle — Top Producing Cases and Procedure Efficiency cards now have a “Show $” toggle to view values as dollar amounts using your set $/point rate.
  • Labor epidural handoff — Labor epidurals can now be marked as shared/handoff cases. Enter the original placement time and your handoff time; points are calculated from handoff forward using tier billing rates.
  • Ticker rate fix — Live ticker production rates now match actual billing tiers (6/3/1.5 pts/hr). OB doubling only applies to UVH OB shifts.
  • Contributor emails — Collective Cases card now shows contributor email addresses instead of anonymous “Contributor 1, 2…” labels.
  • Collective Cases reliability — Fixed card hanging on “Loading shared data…” with proper error handling and a 15-second timeout fallback.
  • SF1 ticker behavior — SF1 no longer has a 4-hr AR minimum. Ticker increments correctly from shift start. Default start time set to 07:00 for SF1, UVH OB, and ACS shifts.
  • Post SF pager pay fix — Post assignments no longer incorrectly receive pager pay.
  • Vacation tracker — New card on the Time page showing vacation days used, remaining, and scheduled.
  • Shift log improvements — Only clocked-in shifts shown. Vacation and pager-eligible shifts displayed properly. Earned vs scheduled shifts differentiated on History page.
  • Calendar as source of truth — Daily calendar is now the single source of truth for shift assignments. Vacation and forced-off shifts protected from being overwritten by calendar sync.
  • Holiday Shift Valuation removed — Removed the Holiday Shift Valuation card from Analytics. Core holiday shift tracking and pay calculations are unchanged.
  • Case breakdown detail — Click any case in the Top Producing Cases list to see a full point breakdown (base units, time, add-ons, multipliers, AR contribution, grand total, dollar value).
  • Session guard — App automatically refreshes your auth session when you return after being away. Persistent banner warns if your session has expired to prevent silent save failures.
  • ASA code auto-fill — Enter an ASA code and startup points auto-fill instantly. A dropdown shows the most common procedures for that code. “View all codes” link opens a full ASA code reference page.

Mar 5, 2026

  • Compensation Rules reference — New page under More tab with all point formulas, shift types, AR rates, pager pay, case points, add-ons, time multipliers, and blending weights.
  • Forced Off time entries hidden — Selecting Forced Off now hides and clears time entry fields since no time tracking is needed. Switching back to another shift type restores the fields.
  • Admin case name editing — Admin edits to other users' case surgeon/procedure names now persist across user re-syncs via a separate overrides collection.
  • Smart current-month projection — Production Pipeline now projects the current month forward using scheduled shifts from calendar sync and historical per-shift-type averages, instead of showing only earned-so-far points.
  • Pipeline & paycheck labels — Earning-for and receiving labels on the Production Pipeline and Paycheck Projection cards are now inline text instead of tooltip icons.
  • Weekly chart hours — This Week chart now shows total clocked hours in the summary, including elapsed time from in-progress shifts.
  • Time page accuracy — Clocked hrs/wk now uses distinct worked weeks (ignoring vacation weeks). Production Trend, Weekend vs Weekday, and Day-of-Week heatmap now filter out vacation, forced off, and future pager-only shifts.
  • Earnings estimator fixes — Avg pts/hr no longer inflated by future pager shifts. Hours/week defaults to your 3-month rolling average. Multi-digit typing in hrs/week input fixed.
  • Future pager pay excluded — Monthly totals, calendar grid, and weekly chart no longer count pager pay for upcoming shifts until the day the pager pay is actually earned.
  • Holiday auction data fix — Multi-day sign-up detection improved. Package vs single-day filter now correctly captures 2, 3, and 4-day sign-ups.

Feb 20, 2026

  • Shared data pool integration — Procedure Time Lookup, Procedure Efficiency, and Surgeon Efficiency now combine your local cases with shared cases from your group. Shared entries are labeled and non-editable. Surgeon autocomplete also suggests names from the shared pool.
  • Collective Cases — New card on the Analytics tab shows the total cases in the shared pool with a collapsible breakdown by contributor.
  • Auto-upload prior cases — All your existing cases are automatically uploaded to the shared pool on first sign-in. No manual upload needed.
  • Shared schema v2 — Shared case data now stores surgeon name and nerve block status instead of raw line/emergency fields. Existing shared data is re-synced automatically.

Feb 19, 2026

  • ASA Code field — New text input on case entry and edit forms for tracking ASA codes (e.g., 00740). Codes are remembered per procedure and auto-filled from autocomplete suggestions.
  • ASA Code in case logs — ASA code shown next to procedure name in data entry list, case log table, and dashboard daily detail.
  • Detailed CSV export — CSV export now outputs one row per case with Procedure, ASA Code, Base Units, Physical Status, Start, End, and Case Points columns.
  • Case import improved — Import Cases page now shows the recommended Excel column format. Headers are matched flexibly so columns like "Procedure", "Proc", or "Description" all work. ASA Code column supported on import.
  • Live pace fix — Pace calculation, daily tally, and calendar grid now use current time as a surrogate when a shift or case has no end time, giving accurate real-time estimates throughout the day.
  • Labor epidural formula updated — New rates: 2.5 pts startup, 6 pts/hr first hour, 3 pts/hr second hour, 1.5 pts/hr third+ hours (24-hr cap). Epidural points now only doubled on UVH OB shifts, not SF1/SF2. Case entry preview reflects the correct formula in real time.
  • Overnight pace fix — Monthly pace no longer advances at midnight. The day resets at 0700, matching the active shift window and preventing false double-counting between midnight and 7am.
  • Vacation & forced-off pace — Vacation and forced-off days now correctly reduce pace projections. Existing calendar data backfilled automatically.
  • Override screen clarification — Points/compensation override now notes that your February paycheck reflects January production, so data should be entered under the production month.
  • Default shift start 07:10 — New shifts default to a 07:10 start time (editable). Matches the most common clock-in time.
  • Pace target & custom goals — The pace bar now shows the monthly point target (bottom-right). Click it to set a custom goal for any month; leave blank to reset to the rolling 3-month average.
  • Removed test data — The "Generate Test Data" button has been removed from settings.
  • Shared case data pool — Case data (procedure, times, ASA code) is now shared to a community collection for group-wide surgeon efficiency and procedure time lookups. Opt out anytime from Settings > Shared Data. Existing cases are backfilled automatically on first sign-in.

Feb 19, 2025

  • Calendar picker — Calendar sync now shows a picker instead of searching for a hardcoded name. Partners can select their own Qgenda calendar.
  • Change Calendar button — Settings shows which calendar is connected with an option to switch.
  • Qgenda support — Calendar sync now recognizes Qgenda assignment names (UVH/SFH prefixes, CV Call, ACSR, OB am/pm, Mole Call, etc.).
  • Endo/Mole logic — UVH Endo correctly maps to Endo on weekdays and Mole on weekends/holidays.
  • Recent Updates page — This page! See what's changed in the app.

Feb 18, 2025

  • Monthly Hours Trend — Data point values now shown on chart; months with no data are hidden.
  • Historical Compensation — Removed info icons from table rows; paid-in info moved into bar tooltips.
  • Today ticker fix — AR locked during 4-hr minimum; open case time estimated correctly.
  • Pending points — Total pending points shown in Watching for Billing header.

Feb 17, 2025

  • Mobile tooltips — Tooltips no longer cut off on mobile; tap-to-show on info icons.
  • Security hardening — localStorage cleared on sign-out; XSS gaps fixed.
  • Annual projection — Rewritten using 3-month rolling average of actual compensation; month-by-month breakdown tooltip added.
  • Production Pipeline — Annual projection stats panel moved into Production Pipeline card.

Feb 16, 2025

  • Pace bar fixes — Weekends excluded from pace calculation; pace bar and header pace now consistent.
  • Stipends excluded — Stipends no longer included in future projections (unpredictable amounts).
  • YTD revenue — YTD received revenue displayed; paycheck entry reminder added.
  • Dashboard renamed — "Dashboard" tab renamed to "Data" for clarity.
  • UI polish — Info icons, collapsible legend, improved pace bar display.

Feb 15, 2025

  • Google Calendar sync — Auto-fill shift types and weekly chart labels from your Google Calendar assignments.
  • Stale sync banner — Dashboard shows a banner when calendar hasn't been synced in 48+ hours.

Compensation Rules

Quick reference for all point calculation formulas, shift types, and modifiers.

Shift Types & AR Points▶
ShiftDay RateEve/NightHol/WkndPager
OR / General20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10No
UVH OB13 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10No
SF 113 pts/hr*20 ×1.10 / ×1.2520 ×1.10Yes
SF 220 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10Yes
1st–4th Call20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10Yes
Mole20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10Yes
Endo20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10Yes
Cardiac / Liver**20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10Yes
NORA20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10No
ACS20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10No
Pre-Call20 pts/hrEve assignment×1.10No
CRNA Supervision20 pts/hr×1.10 / ×1.25×1.10No
Forced Off56 pts flat (no time required)No
Vacation / Off0 pts

*SF1 uses 13 pts/hr on weekday daytime only; 20 pts/hr at all other times.

**Cardiac/Liver base = pager pay + automatic 45-pt subspecialty bonus: 94 pts weekday (14 hrs × 3.5 + 45), 129 pts weekend/holiday (24 hrs × 3.5 + 45).

Evening = 17:00–23:00 (×1.10). Night = 23:00–07:00 (×1.25). Holiday/Weekend daytime = ×1.10.

Pager Pay▶
Rate: 3.5 pts/hr

Eligible shifts: SF1, SF2, 1st–4th Call, Mole, Endo

Day TypeWindowHoursPoints
Weekday17:00 – 07:0014 hrs49 pts
Weekend / Holiday07:00 – 07:0024 hrs84 pts
Standard Case Points▶
Total = Base + Time + Medical + Acute Pain + Emergency + Add-Ons
ComponentFormula
Base Points0.5 × base units
Time Pointscase hours × time multiplier × 6 pts/hr
Medical Proc0.20 × medical units
Acute Pain0.375 × acute pain units
Emergency+1 pt if emergency
Shared CaseBase × (shared % / 100), default 50%

OB shift doubling: non-OR cases on UVH OB, SF1, or SF2 shifts are doubled (×2).

Time Multipliers▶
ModifierWeekday DayWeekday EveWknd/Hol Day
P4 Physical Status×1.33×1.0×1.0
P5 Physical Status×1.83×1.5×1.5
High-Risk Peds×1.33 (min)×1.0×1.0

Multipliers apply to the time component of case points only. Base default is ×1.0.

Add-On Points▶
Add-OnPoints
Brachial Plexus Nerve Block3.0 pts
Other Nerve Block2.6 pts
IT Morphine3.0 pts
PAC2.0 pts
Central Line0.8 pts
Arterial Line0.6 pts
TEE Add-On0.4 pts
TEE Exam22 pts
Fixed-Point Case Types▶
Case TypePoints
Epidural Blood Patch5 pts
Emergency Intubation4 pts
Epidural Rounding (01996)3 pts per round
CRNA Supervision Block2.63 pts
Pain Rounding (99231)2 pts per round
Labor Epidural▶
ComponentRate
Startup2.5 pts (5 units × 50%)
1st Hour6 pts/hr
2nd Hour3 pts/hr
3rd+ Hours1.5 pts/hr (max 24 hrs total)

Doubled (×2) on UVH OB shifts only (not SF1/SF2).

Pre-Call & Evening Minimums▶
PeriodMinimumCondition
Pre-Call OR80 pts4 hrs × 20 pts/hr (weekday non-holiday)
Evening OB52 pts4 hrs × 13 pts/hr (weekday non-holiday)
Evening Other80 pts4 hrs × 20 pts/hr (weekday non-holiday, excl. mole)
Blended Points & Production▶

5-Month Stabilization Weights:

[M-2: 10%] [M-1: 40%] [M: 25%] [M+1: 15%] [M+2: 10%]

Formulas:

Blended = Σ(weight × month points)
Production = Blended × Point Value ($/pt)
Paycheck = Production + Stipends

December Bonus Paycheck: December includes a 2nd paycheck estimated from the year's average, with stipend and non-guaranteed payment entry.

ASA Code Reference

Tap a code to select it

Community Stats

Pooled shift efficiency from everyone at this site who has data sharing enabled. Rows hide until at least 3 shared shifts of that type are in the pool.

Site: —

Loading…

Admin

Your privileges

What you can do based on your role — tap any link to jump to the page where you exercise that privilege.

    AI Analysis (Claude API)

    ⚠ Your API key is stored in your device settings and synced with your account data. Each AI analysis costs ~$0.01-0.05. You are responsible for your own usage.

    How to get an API key
    1. Go to console.anthropic.com
    2. Create an account or sign in
    3. Go to API Keys
    4. Click Create Key
    5. Copy the key and paste it above
    6. Add credits to your account under Billing

    Multi-Site Admin

    Click List Users for the full roster, or filter by email substring to narrow it. Click a card to invite the user, change their site, or grant/revoke admin role.

    Per-user case totals and recent activity. Green dot = the user entered a case in the past 7 days.

    Toggle "Unlocked for signups" once you've confirmed compensation rules with the site supervisors. Locked sites can still be invited to manually.

    unsaved changes

    Edits stay local until you click "Save changes". Saving writes the new rules to Firestore and appends a row to the audit log.

    Base rule reference (MWA defaults)

    These are the MWA base rules a site shift can inherit from. Each shows what the rule pays out of the box; an inheriting site shift starts with these rules and only changes the label, unless you switch to Custom mode.

    Site shift types

    Override entries for this site. Inherited rules show their UVH base in italics.

    Shifts visible in dropdowns

    Controls which shift types this site's users see when adding a shift. Leave all unchecked to fall back to every UVH default.

    Migration map (legacy → site shift)

    When a user moves to this site, shifts tagged with the legacy key are remapped to the chosen site shift.

    Wipes a test user's data: their user profile, settings, all shifts/cases, all shared cases and overrides they own. Their Firebase Auth account is NOT deleted (must be removed manually in the Firebase console).

    Destructive. This cannot be undone. Use only for test accounts.

    User Data Lookup

    Procedure Mappings

    Map procedure-name variants to a canonical name, shared across all sites. Used by the case-finish estimator and any future per-procedure analytics to recognize "TKA" and "Total Knee" as the same case type.

    →

    Day Details

    Select Working Date

    Edit shift type

    Pager window

    Welcome — choose your site

    Select the location where you primarily work. Your shifts and cases will be tracked under this site's compensation rules.

    Don't see your site? Contact your admin to get it unlocked or to receive an invite.

    Site invitation

    You've been invited to —.

    If you accept: all of your shifts and cases will be moved from your current site to the new site. Your data won't be lost — just re-tagged.
